---
name: 📖 Documentation Improvement
about: Suggest improvements or add missing details to project docs
title: 'docs: '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''

---

**Where is the documentation lacking?**
Please specify the file name, section, or endpoint documentation that needs improvement (e.g. `README.md`, `/portfolio` API explanation, codebase onboarding setup).

**Describe the proposed changes**
A clear and concise description of the corrections, expansions, or new document sections you want to introduce.

**Additional Context**
Any additional resources, links, or references that support this documentation change.
